prompt: Build a premium healthcare website inspired by VitalSign - Monitor Your Health. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
VitalSign
Monitoring Features Devices Help
Monitoring Features Devices Help
Real-Time Tracking

Monitor Your
Vital Signs

Track heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen, sleep. AI-powered health insights. Connect wearable devices.

1M+

Users

99.9%

Uptime

Key Metrics

Heart Rate

Real-time monitoring. Resting heart rate analysis. Abnormality alerts.

Average: 72 bpm

Normal range

Blood Pressure

Systolic/diastolic tracking. Trend analysis. Medical alerts.

120/80 mmHg

Healthy level

Oxygen Level

SpO2 monitoring. Hypoxemia detection. 24/7 tracking.

98% SpO2

Excellent

Sleep Quality

Sleep tracking. REM analysis. Sleep stage detection.

7h 45min

Last night

Activity

Steps, calories, distance. Movement goals. Active time tracking.

8,234 steps

82% of goal

Stress Level

Stress detection. Breathing exercises. Mental health insights.

Low

Healthy stress level

Smart Features

AI Health Analysis

Machine learning insights. Personalized recommendations. Health risks.

Wearable Integration

Apple Watch, Fitbit, Garmin support. Instant sync. Cloud storage.

Smart Alerts

Abnormal readings detected. Instant notifications. Emergency SOS.

Detailed Reports

Weekly summaries. Trend analysis. Doctor-shareable reports.

Compatible Devices

Apple Watch

Series 3 & above

Fitbit

All models supported

Oura Ring

Gen 3 model

Patches

Medical grade

Questions?

Yes, we use military-grade encryption. HIPAA compliant. Your data is never sold.
Apple Watch, Fitbit, Garmin, Oura Ring, and many other major wearables. See full list below.
Yes, you can generate reports and share them with your healthcare provider with one click.

Take Control of Your Health

Start monitoring today with real-time insights
